case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. RUBY DURAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURAN, RUBY AN INDIVIDUAL $1,680.99 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,970.99, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, RUBY AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-14-2018
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100032838), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC SERVED MAR-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, RUBY AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF SECURITY INTERESTS (TRANSACTION ID # 62557396) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, RUBY AN INDIVIDUAL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, RUBY AN INDIVIDUAL

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $290.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $400.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62557396) AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, RUBY AN INDIVIDUAL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62557396) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
